use_cases: Creating animated text headings with hover reveal effects for hero sections and navigation
Building interactive labels on buttons or CTAs with character-by-character animation
Adding subtle motion to typography in portfolio or creative agency websites
Designing animated section titles that respond to user hover interactions
Enhancing text links with a polished, modern reveal animation
ai_summary: A hover-triggered text roll component that animates individual characters sliding upward to reveal hidden text underneath, creating a staggered reveal effect. Built with Framer Motion, it supports centered or left-aligned character timing and provides a clean, minimalist way to add interactive typography to any UI element like buttons, headings, or navigation links.
